name: Multi-Channel Delivery Router — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Receives a ready-to-send insight payload, resolves whether it should land in Slack, Teams, email, or a webhook, adapts the format for that surface, and applies fallback routing without cloning the business logic for each tool. Native-first Workato blueprint that favors recipe functions, custom connectors, and native delivery/connectivity surfaces over raw HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
SMTP-compatible email connector for outbound delivery
Lookup tables, data tables, or project properties for routing and canonical maps
Webhook connector, database connector, queue adapter, or downstream orchestrator action
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or ad hoc API request actions for Slack, CRM, calendar, or email delivery
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties comments, or recipe notes
No agent output sent straight to transport or records without JSON schema validation
No routing, dedupe, or retry logic hidden inside opaque code snippets when Recipe Functions or data tables can own it

trigger_model.recommended_surface: Callable recipe or Recipe Function invocation from a parent orchestrator

targets: Webhook, queue, database, or downstream workflow sink
connectors: Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
SMTP-compatible email connector for outbound delivery
Webhook connector, database connector, queue adapter, or downstream orchestrator action

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize the Multi-Channel Delivery Router trigger into the shared run_context contract.
Load and normalize the primary Multi-Channel Delivery Router business inputs into source_record objects.
Join the intermediate context needed for Multi-Channel Delivery Router, especially Resolve Destination.
Render normalized delivery_payload objects for Multi-Channel Delivery Router.
Capture deterministic summary, dedupe, and retry state for Multi-Channel Delivery Router.

main_recipes.trigger: Callable recipe or Recipe Function invocation from a parent orchestrator
steps: Use native connector action for Resolve Destination
Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for Adapt Message Format
Use database, queue, webhook, or downstream app connector for Deliver to Preferred Channel
Use Slack connector for Apply Fallback Route
Record deterministic run summary and retry state

adapt_message_format.intent: Transforms the same insight into Slack-safe markdown, Teams-safe copy/cards, email HTML/plain text, or webhook-safe JSON envelopes.

deployment_notes: Store connector configuration, defaults, and destination IDs in connection objects or project properties.
Use lookup tables or data tables for routing maps, dedupe keys, and canonical mappings.
Split fan-out delivery into deterministic recipe-function stages so Slack, Teams, and email stay independently testable.
Keep synthesis agentic, but keep delivery and persistence deterministic.
